case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TAX COLLECTOR VS. JANICE HIGUERA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-22-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-22-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-22-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
